headline: Analysts Raise Digital Realty Trust (DLR) Price Target Due to Strong AI Infrastructure Demand
summary: Digital Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE:DLR) is one of the Best Digital Infrastructure REITs to Buy According to Analysts. Based on a report by TheFly on April 27, Scotiabank analyst Maher Yaghi raised the price target on Digital Realty to $222 from $195 while maintaining an Outperform rating on the stock, driven by the strong demand […]
